tools.name: admin.agent.restart_supervisor
tools.description: Restart the agent supervisor and its whole service tree (confirm required).

tools.name: admin.network.wifi_join
tools.description: Join a management Wi-Fi network.

tools.name: admin.network.wifi_leave
tools.description: Leave the current management Wi-Fi network.

tools.name: admin.node.rename
tools.description: Set the node's display name (shown in pairing and the fleet card). Not the OS hostname.

tools.name: admin.pairing.claim
tools.description: Claim an unpaired node for an operator (LAN presence is the auth boundary).

tools.name: admin.pairing.generate_code
tools.description: Mint a fresh local pair code (while the node is unpaired).

tools.name: admin.pairing.info
tools.description: Read the node's pairing status and reach info.

tools.name: admin.pairing.unpair
tools.description: Release the node's pairing (invalidates credentials derived from the pairing key).

tools.name: admin.wfb.channel
tools.description: Set the WFB radio channel (agent validates against its allowed set).

tools.name: admin.wfb.tx_power
tools.description: Set WFB TX power in dBm (agent clamps to its configured ceiling).

tools.name: audit.query
tools.description: Query this MCP server's own local audit log (every tool call it made), newest first. Filter by tool, node, decision, or time.

tools.name: audit.search
tools.description: Search this MCP server's own local audit log, newest first. The query is a field-qualified grammar: a `field:value` term (field one of tool / node / operator / decision / result) filters that field, and any other term is matched across the whole event. Example: `tool:params.set decision:denied`.

tools.name: config.get
tools.description: Read the agent configuration document (secret-shaped fields redacted).

tools.name: config.set
tools.description: Set one agent configuration value by dotted key (network paths escalate to admin and need confirm).

tools.name: fleet.list_nodes
tools.description: List the nodes reachable through this connection, with a status summary.

tools.name: flight.arm
tools.description: Arm the vehicle. Requires the flight scope and an operator-present or signed confirm (or --sim).

tools.name: flight.disarm
tools.description: Disarm the vehicle. Requires the flight scope and an operator-present or signed confirm (or --sim).

tools.name: flight.land
tools.description: Command the vehicle to land. Requires the flight scope and an operator-present or signed confirm (or --sim).

tools.name: flight.mode
tools.description: Set the flight mode by name (e.g. GUIDED, RTL, LOITER). Requires the flight scope + confirm/sim.

tools.name: flight.rtl
tools.description: Return to launch. Requires the flight scope and an operator-present or signed confirm (or --sim).

tools.name: flight.takeoff
tools.description: Takeoff to an altitude AGL in metres. Requires the flight scope + confirm/sim.

tools.name: logs.query
tools.description: Query the node's agent logs (optional level filter, bounded count).

tools.name: params.diff_from_default
tools.description: List the parameters whose value differs from the firmware default.

tools.name: params.explain
tools.description: Explain a parameter's meaning (metadata + the node's current value) without changing it.

tools.name: params.get
tools.description: Read one flight-controller parameter with its decoded meaning and metadata.

tools.name: params.optimize
tools.description: Read-only tuning advisory. Reads every FC parameter joined with firmware metadata and returns deterministic, metadata-grounded observations plus the joined data for the model to reason over. Writes nothing; applying a change is params.set.

tools.name: params.read_all
tools.description: Read flight-controller parameters joined with firmware metadata (meaning, range, default). Filter with prefix or search; large sets are paged by limit.

tools.name: params.set
tools.description: Set one flight-controller parameter to a numeric value (confirm required; flight-critical names need the flight scope and a signed confirm).

tools.name: plugins.config
tools.description: Set one plugin configuration value (scope drone|global).

tools.name: plugins.disable
tools.description: Disable an installed plugin by id (confirm required).

tools.name: plugins.enable
tools.description: Enable an installed plugin by id (confirm required).

tools.name: plugins.info
tools.description: Read one installed plugin's detail and manifest.

tools.name: plugins.install
tools.description: Install a plugin from a signed archive url with a sha256 pin (confirm required).

tools.name: plugins.list
tools.description: List installed plugins on the node.

tools.name: plugins.remove
tools.description: Remove an installed plugin by id, optionally keeping its data (confirm required).

tools.name: services.list
tools.description: List the node's services and their running state.

tools.name: services.restart
tools.description: Restart one supervised service on the node (confirm required).

tools.name: status.full
tools.description: Read the node's full status document (every reported field).

tools.name: status.get
tools.description: Read the node's consolidated status (link, FC, battery, mode, health).

tools.name: status.health
tools.description: A rollup of the node's reachability and reported health state.

tools.name: status.ping
tools.description: A liveness probe: whether the node answers, with round-trip latency.

tools.name: status.system
tools.description: Read host resources: cpu, memory, disk, temperature, load, uptime.

tools.name: status.version
tools.description: Read the agent version and firmware identity for the node.

tools.name: telemetry.snapshot
tools.description: A one-shot flight telemetry read: battery, gps, position, attitude, mode.

tools.name: vision.status
tools.description: Read the perception engine status: model, tier, detection state.
